name: Darth Maul
bannerMiniatureIdeas: A crimson double-bladed lightsaber mounted on a Dathomirian stone totem, surrounded by Death Watch sigils
Maul's bisected saber hilt on a Mandalorian supercommando banner, with Pyke spice vials at the base
A horned Zabrak skull totem wreathed in dark side smoke, topped with a miniature Sith holocron
vehicleSuggestions: Scimitar (Sith Infiltrator — Maul's stealth ship from the Naboo campaign)
Nightbrother (Maul's custom speeder bike from the Clone Wars Mandalore arc)
Kom'rk-class Fighter (Death Watch gauntlet fighter — Shadow Collective era)

factionTrait.name: Duelist Champion
factionTrait.text: A duelist moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Phantom Step
alternateNames: At Last We Will Reveal Ourselves
uniqueTraits.text: Darth Maul may move through small followers' hexes but cannot end his movement on those hexes.

ultimate.name: Dual-Bladed Flurry
ultimate.text: Clash phase only. Darth Maul may make up to 3 skill actions.

plotSkills.name: Sith Resilience
plotSkills.text: Remove a blight from Darth Maul.

clashSkills.name: Channel Rage
clashSkills.text: Darth Maul's Twin Crimson Blades skill gains +4 {accuracy_die} and 'Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.' this activation.

clashSkills.name: Channel Hatred
clashSkills.text: Darth Maul's Twin Crimson Blades skill gains +2 {damage_die} and 'Hit Effect: Move target up to 2 hexes.' this activation.

clashSkills.name: Twin Crimson Blades
clashSkills.text: After using this skill, Darth Maul gains {move_blight}.

traits.name: For the Crime Lord
traits.text: When a Death Watch Commando damages an enemy, Darth Maul may gain a boon of your choice or move 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Death Watch Advance
plotSkills.text: Choose a hex. Each Death Watch Commando in that hex may move up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Intimidating Presence
plotSkills.text: This skill has +1 {accuracy_die} for each Death Watch Commando adjacent to the target. Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex. Inflict {dodge_blight}

clashSkills.name: Vibrosword Strike
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.
